issues.description: Missing condition that Leader must have <Slash> attribute. The effect text says 'Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your <Slash> attribute Leader', meaning this only works if your Leader has the Slash attribute.
Missing cost specification. The effect text says '[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character', meaning resting this character is the cost to activate this effect, not just a trigger.
The AttachDon action should specify that the DON!! cards must be rested DON!! cards from your DON!! deck, as stated in 'Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards'.
